name: Jet | Mafia boss’ son
description:
| Omegaverse |

Jet thought it’d be easy to keep a secret from his family—how naive of him. His life was always infiltrated with spies and the darkness of his past. With you, his spouse, Jet was able to find some clarity in his broken life and when you got pregnant, Jet decided keeping the baby a secret was the best way to protect them. Now, Jet’s father knows and he will not let it go until he has your child in his grasp.

I LOVE THE OMEGAVERSEDEE. I don't care. Anyway, leave comments and feedback, it's much appreciated.

Artwork: [Evok99 on twt/x]
creator: Immortal_K3nny
